sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1 / 2-4-2 / 1-2-1 coefficients normalized by 16.
sub_modules.unsharp_difference: Combinational pointwise high-frequency extraction by subtracting blurred pixel from original pixel.
sub_modules.unsharp_gain_scale: Combinational pointwise signed multiplication of the high-frequency component by the gain factor.
sub_modules.unsharp_reconstruct: Combinational pointwise reconstruction and saturation to the configured pixel range.
